description: You are a recording engineer tracking a live band. In the 'MyProject' session, set up an independent pre-fader headphone cue mix for the drummer using a bus track named 'Drummer Cue'. Ensure the session contains audio tracks named 'Click Track', 'Bass', and 'Vocal'. Route pre-fader sends from these tracks to the 'Drummer Cue' bus with the following gain levels: Click Track at 0 dB, Bass at -12.0 dB, and Vocal at -6.0 dB. Disconnect the 'Drummer Cue' bus from the Master output and save the session.
